summary: Comprehensive testing of 12EN12 Gallego Trainer platform after bug fixes. Backend APIs working at 95.8% success rate. Frontend registration and plan selection working well. Some navigation and login issues identified.

timeout_issues.issue: AI routine generation times out after 10 seconds
timeout_issues.impact: Expected behavior for Claude Sonnet 4.5 LLM responses

authentication_issues.issue: Demo user (clientedemo@test.com/demo123) login fails - stays on /auth page

navigation_issues.issue: Navigation elements 'Nutrición', 'Reportes', 'Mi Perfil' not found by text selectors

integration_issues.issue: 404 error on /api/clients/profile for new users before plan selection

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API health check (24/25 endpoints working)
✅ Plan selection UI displays all 4 plans (Gold/Silver/Bronze/ELM)
✅ Plan features properly listed and priced

success_percentage.authentication: 40% (new user reg works, existing login fails)

high_priority: Fix admin login functionality - admin@12en12.com/admin123 not working
Investigate why existing demo user login fails (clientedemo@test.com/demo123)
medium_priority: Check navigation element selectors for Nutrición, Reportes, Mi Perfil pages
Verify all client dashboard pages are accessible and functional
low_priority: Consider adding user-friendly error messages for login failures
Optimize AI routine generation timeout handling
